/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/Animation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/Colors.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/Lighting.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/algorithms/Animation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/algorithms/Clipping.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/algorithms/Filling.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/algorithms/Rasterization.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/algorithms/Shading.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/algorithms/Transformations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/algorithms/Viewing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/algorithms/Visibility.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/cube/CubeFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/cube/Cubie.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/cube/Move.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/cube/RubiksCube.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/solver/PatternLibrary.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/solver/ReverseSolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/solver/Scrambler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/ui/HUD.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/ui/Picking.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/ui/SolutionPlayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/ui/SolveMode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/ui/WelcomeScreen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/utils/MathUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RubikX3D.dir/src/utils/ScoreManager.cpp.o -o RubikX3D  -framework OpenGL -framework OpenGL -framework GLUT -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo
